title: Count dunning notices — operationId vs DB-noun trap (collections skill)
prompt: Using the collections-and-dunning skill, answer: how many dunning notices currently exist? Restrict to active records (visibility 0). Output just the number on the RESULT line, e.g. `RESULT: 9`. (Note: the DB noun is `dunning`, but the client/CLI operation is not named `listDunning` — discover the correct operation before calling it.)
